description:
This quiz tests intermediate JavaScript developers' understanding of Promises, including async/await, error handling, and chaining. It uses an approachable, hands-on teaching tone with hints and encourages practical experimentation in the browser console or repl.it. The difficulty level is moderate, focusing on real-world application of asynchronous concepts.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, async/await, error handling, Promise chaining, asynchronous programming
Audience: JavaScript developers with basic knowledge seeking to strengthen their understanding of asynchronous operations and Promise-based coding patterns.
